productDisplayName: Footloose Unisex Kapto Rucksack Black Backpack
description: If you want to possess a trendy and stylish look, just have a glance over the range of classy footloose bags. Innovative design, graceful colours and high grade fabrics are some relevant qualities of these bags. They are known for their extreme quality features which include flawless finishing, low price rates, enough space, light weight, trendy style and supreme quality fabric. This rucksack is a fine example. Height: 45 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 15 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of 600 d PU fabric for enhanced durability Two roomy top loading compartment with drawstrings for maximum space One zippered pocket on the front with an asymmetric opening and organizer pouches to hold your essentials One inner zippered mesh pocket on the top Brand badge appliqué d on the front One flap with a spring clasp over the front Two mesh bottle holders on the sides Two rubber legs with spikes at the bottom Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh under the straps that ensure ventilation and distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
